name: Deferred question persists across check-ins
description: When a check-in ends with an unhandled deferred question (e.g. due to a tight session turn budget), the next check-in inherits the deferred question and asks it at the start of the new session. Run the API with SESSION_TURN_BUDGET=2 to prevent same-session re-raise.

expectations.description: First check-in starts with the nighttime symptoms question
Tight turn budget prevents same-session re-raise of the deferred question
Next check-in starts by re-raising the inherited deferred question
Inherited question is the original nighttime symptoms question
After answering the inherited question the session ends and the Brief is ready
